content: The intrinsic curiosity bonuses computed by ICM/RND methods for curiosity-driven RL can be repurposed as a dynamic uncertainty sampling score for 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory systems, where states with high prediction error (the core of ICM/RND curiosity signals) are prioritized for storage and replay over low-error familiar states. This creates a hybrid agent that actively curates its episodic memory based on intrinsic learning potential, rather than just recency or task reward.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
